issues.description: Counter effect is missing the conditional check for 3+ Characters. The second PowerBoost should only occur if the condition is met, not as a separate unconditional action.
Second effect (KO opponent Character with cost ≤4) has no basis in the card text. This effect does not appear in the official card description.
The second PowerBoost should be conditional on 'HasCardOnBoard' with count 3+ (your Characters), not an independent action.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Counter] Up to 1 of your Leader or Character cards gains +2000 power during this battle. Then, if you have 3 or more Characters, that card gains an additional +1000 power during this battle.
